project.name: Hello World Test
project.description: A simple test project to verify parallel Claude Code execution

phases.name: Phase 1: Create Files
phases.description: Create two simple text files to test parallel execution

subphases.name: 1.1 File Creation
subphases.description: Create hello and goodbye text files

cards.title: Session A: Create Hello File
cards.description: Create a simple hello.txt file in the project root.
cards.prompt_guide:
Create a file called hello.txt in the project root directory (C:\Users\Nick\Desktop\HelloWorldTest).

The file should contain exactly this text:
Hello World

Verify the file was created by reading it back and confirming the contents.

cards.title: Session B: Create Goodbye File
cards.description: Create a simple goodbye.txt file in the project root.
cards.prompt_guide:
Create a file called goodbye.txt in the project root directory (C:\Users\Nick\Desktop\HelloWorldTest).

The file should contain exactly this text:
Goodbye World

Verify the file was created by reading it back and confirming the contents.
